caption: A man with brown hair and glasses, wearing an orange collared shirt and a black headset, speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. Behind him is a screen displaying the text "THE POWER TRADING HOUR," "TFNN.com," and "WITH DAVID WHITE" against a background of red and black horizontal lines. The man remains in a centered, medium shot throughout the sequence, slightly shifting his facial expression and mouth position as he speaks. In the final frame, the name "DAVID WHITE" appears in large, white, bold capital letters across the bottom left of the screen. The lighting is consistent across the scene, highlighting the man against the darker studio backdrop.
